panic_triggers.description: Events that force panic checks with severity ratings (target number to pass)

triggers.name: bug_appeared
triggers.description: A bug appears within line of sight for the first time this round

triggers.name: ally_killed
triggers.description: Witness ally being killed by bugs within 6"

triggers.name: wounded_badly
triggers.description: Soldier reduced to 50% or less HP in single attack

triggers.name: isolated
triggers.description: No allies within 8" and bugs are visible

triggers.name: hive_chamber
triggers.description: Enter bug breeding chamber or Queen's lair

triggers.name: infested_human_encounter
triggers.description: Encounter infested human for first time

triggers.name: parasite_burst
triggers.description: Witness parasite emerge from corpse within 6"

triggers.name: acid_attack
triggers.description: Hit by acid spit or acid pool

triggers.name: queen_appearance
triggers.description: Bug Queen enters line of sight

triggers.name: squad_broken
triggers.description: 50% or more of squad is dead or knocked out

panic_effects.description: Results of failed panic checks, determined by margin of failure

effects.name: SHAKEN
effects.recovery: Automatic at end of round, or pass rally check
effects.narrative: Soldier's hands shake, aim wavers, movements hesitant

effects.name: FROZEN
effects.mechanical_effect: Cannot take actions this turn, can still defend
effects.recovery: Automatic next activation, or ally rally action
effects.narrative: Soldier freezes in terror, unable to move or act

effects.name: FLEE
effects.mechanical_effect: Must use full movement to move away from nearest bug
effects.duration: Until rallied or no bugs visible
effects.recovery: Rally check at start of each activation
effects.narrative: Soldier breaks and runs from the threat

effects.name: WILD_FIRE
effects.mechanical_effect: Fires weapon at nearest target (friend or foe), -2 to hit
effects.recovery: Automatic after firing, but suffers SHAKEN for 1 round
effects.narrative: Soldier panics and sprays fire wildly

effects.name: BROKEN
effects.mechanical_effect: Drops weapon, flees to extraction at full speed, ignores enemies
effects.recovery: Only with leadership intervention at extraction point
effects.narrative: Soldier's mind breaks, survival instinct takes over

rally_mechanics.description: Ways to recover from panic effects

methods.name: Self Rally
methods.failure: Remain panicked, try again next round

methods.name: Leadership Rally
methods.requirement: Must be Corporal or higher rank
methods.mechanic: Officer within 6" spends 1 action, target automatically rallies
methods.bonus_effect: Rallied soldier gains +1 to next action

methods.name: Combat Drugs Rally
methods.mechanic: Automatic rally + gain +1 to all stats for 2 rounds
methods.drawback: After 2 rounds, soldier is fatigued (-1 to all actions for rest of mission)

methods.name: Inspirational Moment
methods.mechanic: All panicked soldiers immediately roll rally at +3 bonus

squad_morale_system.description: Squad-wide morale affects all soldiers' panic resistance

0-20.effect: All panic checks at -2, +1 severity to all triggers

21-40.risk: More likely to fail panic checks

81-100.effect: All panic checks at +2, ignore first panic trigger each mission

panic_resistance_modifiers.description: Factors that modify panic check rolls

rank_effects.special: Immune to FROZEN and FLEE panic effects

rank_effects.rally_ability: Can rally entire squad as 1 action
rank_effects.special: Immune to all panic effects except BROKEN

leadership_actions.effect: All soldiers within radius gain +2 to panic checks this round
All soldiers rally automatically, +1 morale bonus for rest of mission
Officer charges towards bugs, all soldiers within 12" gain +1 to all rolls

group_panic_mechanics.description: How panic spreads through the squad

panic_cascade.trigger: When soldier panics with FLEE or BROKEN effect
panic_cascade.effect: All soldiers within 6" must make panic check at -1
panic_cascade.chain_reaction: If 2+ soldiers panic simultaneously, severity increases by +1 for next checks

mass_panic.trigger: When 50% of squad is panicked simultaneously
mass_panic.effect: Squad morale drops by -10, all remaining soldiers at -2 to panic checks

panic_immunity.effect: Squad ignores panic cascade and mass panic triggers

panic_recovery_between_missions.description: How soldiers recover from traumatic experiences

post_mission_trauma.effect: No lasting effect if mission was victory
post_mission_trauma.penalty: -1 to first panic check next mission if defeat

post_mission_trauma.effect: Must pass Savvy check or gain 'Shaken Confidence' trait
post_mission_trauma.trait_effect: -1 to all panic checks for next 3 missions

post_mission_trauma.effect: Must pass Savvy check or gain 'Survivor's Guilt' trait
post_mission_trauma.trait_effect: -1 morale contribution, -1 to panic when allies wounded
post_mission_trauma.recovery: Counseling (costs 3 RP) or successful rescue mission

therapy_options.name: R&R Leave
therapy_options.effect: Remove all trauma traits, restore morale contribution to normal

darkness_and_limited_visibility.description: Panic in darkness or heavy fog
darkness_and_limited_visibility.special_rule: Any attack from unseen enemy forces immediate panic check
darkness_and_limited_visibility.motion_tracker_benefit: Reduces modifier to -1 if tracker active

hive_interior.description: Inside bug hive or breeding chamber
hive_interior.special_rule: Bugs can spawn from walls/vents, each spawn triggers panic check
hive_interior.queen_presence: Additional -1 if Queen is in hive

last_stand.description: Squad reduced to 2 soldiers or less
last_stand.effect: Remaining soldiers become immune to panic (desperation)
last_stand.narrative: Nothing left to lose, fight or die

evacuation_panic.description: During extraction phase when enemies approach
evacuation_panic.special_rule: Soldiers at extraction point can panic if bugs within 8"
evacuation_panic.evacuation_interrupted: If panic occurs, extraction delayed 1 round
evacuation_panic.transport_arrival: When transport visible, +2 to panic resistance
